enforce_asset_filter_meltdown.description: CRITICAL: Enforces asset filter. Blocks areas, valuations, and property rights.

enforce_pii_privacy_meltdown.description: CRITICAL: Enforces PII filter. Blocks phones, IDs, exact addresses, and social accounts.

enable_e2ee_blind_relay.description: Enables End-to-End Encrypted (E2EE) blind relay for family mesh synchronization.

network.justification: Required strictly for AES-256 E2EE Blind Relay. No plaintext data is ever transmitted or stored on cloud servers.
